sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89148" key="prosepeisfe/rw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσεπ-εισφέρω</orth>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> foreg., <sense id="n89148.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἐπεισόδια</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Longin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.12</biblScope></bibl></cit>. </sense> <sense n="2" id="n89148.1" level="3" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">contribute in addition</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:5:140" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.140</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
